interpretation.supported: Imposing phi through a golden-ratio low-discrepancy measurement-history schedule improved finite-shot spectral-purity estimation in this reduced benchmark.
interpretation.not_supported: The schedule did not resolve signed anti-alignment and therefore cannot replace the signed-readout semantic gate.
interpretation.next_proof_target: Identify the exact discrepancy/return-time property responsible for the RMSE reduction, then test whether a minimal retained-history transfer forces the same irrational rotation rather than assuming phi.

claim_boundary: Finite diagnostic on simulated Page-curve readout. Phi was inserted by design; this is not a root derivation and not evidence that nature universally selects phi.
